description: Server executor: New `executeParallelDispatchServer()` function in `build.js`. Uses non-module-scoped emitted-states map to track per-task progress. Calls `parallelStart()`, then polls with `parallelPoll()` in a loop that exits on `outcome != null`. Emits per-task progress events via `emitPerTaskProgress()` helper. 7 tests.
phase: T2-F5-COMPOSE-MIGRATE: Server-Side Dispatch for All Parallel Steps
